# tripleS Bias Sorter

> Interactive web app to rank all 24 tripleS (K-pop) members through pairwise battles. Optional sign-in saves ranking history. Hosted at https://sssorter.pages.dev/

## Primary pages

- [Bias sorter (home)](https://sssorter.pages.dev/): Main ranking experience — compare two members per round until a full bias list is produced; share results and export images.
- [Song sorter](https://sssorter.pages.dev/songs): Separate app to rank tripleS discography (pairwise song battles).

## Site map & discovery

- [Sitemap](https://sssorter.pages.dev/sitemap.xml): Canonical URLs for crawlers.

## For agents

- Public, read-only browsing of the ranking UI is encouraged for describing how the sorter works.
- Do not automate account sign-in or scrape authenticated ranking history without user consent.
- Member photos and UI are fan-made tooling; tripleS and related trademarks belong to their rights holders.

## Maintainer

- [GitHub / contact](https://sssorter.pages.dev/): Site credits @celdaris in page metadata; open-source MIT (see repository README).
